subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of the love of God! Mention of thee was made in this gathering, and a sweet fragrance reached the spiritual ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بنار محبت الله ذکرت در این انجمن گذشت بوی خوشی در مشام روحانیان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @poems and quotation from poetry, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat]
